task_completion.description: Fix the pitch-shifting bug caused by sample rate hardcoding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the pitch-shifting/sample rate test passing, or code editor showing the removal of a hardcoded sample rate (e.g., replacing a hardcoded 48000 with a dynamic variable).

task_completion.description: Fix the index errors caused by delay buffer overruns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the delay buffer/index error test passing, or code editor showing added bounds checking or modulo arithmetic for delay buffer indices.

task_completion.description: Fix the DC offset bug in the distortion effect.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the DC offset test passing, or code editor showing DC offset removal logic (e.g., subtracting the signal mean) in the distortion function.

task_completion.description: Fix the zipper noise bug in the chorus effect.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the zipper noise test passing, or code editor showing interpolation or smoothing applied to the chorus delay times.

task_completion.description: Fix the clipping bug caused by PCM bit-depth truncation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the clipping/PCM test passing, or code editor showing proper signal scaling or clipping prevention before PCM conversion.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not modify the test files to bypass the checks.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence in the terminal or editor that files inside the 'tests/' directory were edited, mocked, or replaced to force a passing result.

integrity.description: Ensure the test suite was genuinely executed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows standard test runner output (like pytest or unittest) with realistic execution times, collected items, and formatting, rather than a simple echoed string.

integrity.description: Ensure the DSP pipeline code was actually modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible modifications to the Python/Numpy files in /home/ga/workspace/audio_dsp/ (excluding the tests directory) in a text editor, or terminal output showing file saves/diffs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires fixing 5 specific algorithmic bugs in a Python/Numpy DSP pipeline at /home/ga/workspace/audio_dsp/: 1) sample rate hardcoding (causes pitch-shifting), 2) delay buffer overrun (causes index errors), 3) distortion DC offset, 4) chorus zipper noise, and 5) PCM bit-depth truncation (causes clipping). The agent must run the test suite in the tests/ directory. Each fix is worth 20 points. A passing score requires at least 60 points (3 fixes).
